html:
Exclusive to:

The Fancy Helmet is a craftable Armor Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab, requires 3 Alloy and 3 Cork to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.

Fancy Helmets reduce Player Speed by 10% and there is a 16.67% chance to spawn a single Fancy Helmet in the Secret Bandit Camp.

Gallery

  • Wilba wearing a Fancy Helmet.
  • Wheeler wearing a Fancy Helmet.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Protects my brains.”
–Wilson
“This protects my brain.”
–Willow
“Is funny little tin hat.”
–Wolfgang
“It'll protect my head but not my heart.”
–Wendy
“SCALPED METAL HEAD”
–WX-78
“It's similar to the Spanish colonials.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a little cold.”
–Woodie
“How very conquistadorian.”
–Maxwell
“Incredibly durable. Though incredibly dense as well.”
–Wagstaff
“'twill prötect mine head!”
–Wigfrid
“A fancy helmet to protect our head.”
–Webber
“Keeps my noggin safe.”
–Walani
“I prefer a chef hat.”
–Warly
“Prefer me captain's hat.”
–Woodlegs
“SHINY HAT DOTH PROTECTETH BRAINPAINS”
–Wilba
“Clink Rock Head Thing”
–Wormwood
“Saves me head pain but gives me neck pain.”
–Wheeler
The Fancy Helmet is a craftable Armor Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab, requires 3 Alloy and 3 Cork to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.
Fancy Helmets reduce Player Speed by 10% and there is a 16.67% chance to spawn a single Fancy Helmet in the Secret Bandit Camp.

The '''Fancy Helmet''' is a craftable [[Armor]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Fight Tab]], requires 3 [[Alloy]] and 3 [[Cork]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype.

Fancy Helmets reduce [[Player Speed]] by 10% and there is a 16.67% chance to spawn a single Fancy Helmet in the [[Secret Bandit Camp]].
